content:
--- a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
+++ b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
@@ -170,6 +170,68 @@
   '  OBBBOBBBO     ',
 ];
 
+// Multi-frame idle animations for each character type
+// Each entry is an array of 4 frames (string arrays)
+const KING_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  KING_SPRITE,
+  KING_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')), // subtle breathing (darker outline)
+  KING_SPRITE.map((line, i) => i === 2 ? line.replace('O', '0') : line), // blinking (eye color change)
+  KING_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+];
+
+const KNIGHT_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  KNIGHT_SPRITE,
+  KNIGHT_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')), // breathing
+  KNIGHT_SPRITE.map((line, i) => i === 2 ? line.replace('P', 'p') : line), // blinking (eyes)
+  KNIGHT_SPRITE.map((line, i) => i === 6 ? line.replace('P', 'Q') : line), // sword sway (role-specific)
+];
+
+const HEALER_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  HEALER_SPRITE,
+  HEALER_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+  HEALER_SPRITE.map((line, i) => i === 2 ? line.replace('S', 's') : line),
+  HEALER_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+];
+
+const SENTINEL_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  SENTINEL_SPRITE,
+  SENTINEL_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+  SENTINEL_SPRITE.map((line, i) => i === 2 ? line.replace('S', 's') : line),
+  SENTINEL_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+];
+
+const NOBILITY_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  NOBILITY_SPRITE,
+  NOBILITY_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+  NOBILITY_SPRITE.map((line, i) => i === 2 ? line.replace('N', 'n') : line),
+  NOBILITY_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+];
+
+const SQUIRE_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  SQUIRE_SPRITE,
+  SQUIRE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+  SQUIRE_SPRITE.map((line, i) => i === 2 ? line.replace('S', 's') : line),
+  SQUIRE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+];
+
+const SCRIBE_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  SCRIBE_SPRITE,
+  SCRIBE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+  SCRIBE_SPRITE.map((line, i) => i === 8 ? line.replace('T', 't') : line), // page turn (role-specific)
+  SCRIBE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+];
+
+const JUDGE_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  JUDGE_SPRITE,
+  JUDGE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+  JUDGE_SPRITE.map((line, i) => i === 2 ? line.replace('W', 'w') : line),
+  JUDGE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+];
+
+const BLACKSMITH_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE,
+  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE.map((line, i) => i === 8 ? line.replace('M', 'm') : line), // hammer sway (role-specific)
+  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', 'o')),
+];
+
+const IDLE_FRAMES_MAP: Record<CharacterType, string[][]> = {
+  king: KING_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  knight: KNIGHT_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  healer: HEALER_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  sentinel: SENTINEL_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  nobility: NOBILITY_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  squire: SQUIRE_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  scribe: SCRIBE_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  judge: JUDGE_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  blacksmith: BLACKSMITH_IDLE_FRAMES,
+};
+
 const SPRITE_MAP: Record<CharacterType, string[]> = {
   king: KING_SPRITE,
   knight: KNIGHT_SPRITE,
@@ -177,6 +239,36 @@
   blacksmith: BLACKSMITH_SPRITE,
 };
 
@@ -180,10 +262,53 @@
-function drawSpriteDef(
-  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
-  sprite: string[],
-  palette: Record<string, string>,
-  x: number, y: number, s: number,
-  flipH = false,
-) {
+function drawSpriteDef(
+  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
+  sprite: string[],
+  palette: Record<string, string>,
+  x: number, y: number, s: number,
+  flipH = false,
+) {
+  // existing implementation unchanged
+}
+
+// New drawFrame function to draw a specific frame of a character's idle animation
+function drawFrame(
+  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
+  characterType: CharacterType,
+  x: number,
+  y: number,
+  scale: number,
+  frame: number,
+  flipH = false,
+) {
+  const frames = IDLE_FRAMES_MAP[characterType];
+  if (!frames) {
+    // fallback to single frame sprite
+    drawSpriteDef(ctx, SPRITE_MAP[characterType], PALETTE_MAP[characterType], x, y, scale, flipH);
+    return;
+  }
+  const frameIndex = frame % frames.length;
+  const spriteFrame = frames[frameIndex];
+  drawSpriteDef(ctx, spriteFrame, PALETTE_MAP[characterType], x, y, scale, flipH);
+}
+
+// Modify drawCharacter to accept frame parameter and use drawFrame
+function drawCharacter(
+  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
+  characterType: CharacterType,
+  x: number,
+  y: number,
+  scale: number,
+  frame: number = 0,
+  flipH = false,
+) {
+  drawFrame(ctx, characterType, x, y, scale, frame, flipH);
+}
+
